sn.s: El reto más grande es la velocidad.
sn.e: The biggest challenge is the speed.

sn.s: Los nicas hablan rápido y se comen letras.
sn.e: Nicas talk fast and swallow letters.

sn.s: Al principio me perdía todo el tiempo.
sn.e: At first I got lost all the time.

sn.s: Pero poco a poco, mi oído se acostumbra.
sn.e: But little by little, my ear gets used to it.

sn.s: Ahora capto más, aunque no todo.
sn.e: Now I catch more, though not everything.
Before I didn't understand. Now I do.
"Yeah, on my way," I respond without thinking.

sn.s: Entender el habla rápida es medio idioma.
sn.e: Understanding fast speech is half the language.

sn.s: Ya no pido que repitan tanto.
sn.e: I don't ask them to repeat as much anymore.

sn.s: El oído entrenado es la clave de la fluidez.
sn.e: A trained ear is the key to fluency.
